# Why It Matters
This is the top-level contract for the package manager and runner that the repo standardizes on. It explains uv as a single tool spanning projects, scripts, tools, Python versions, and a pip-compatible interface.

# Key Excerpts
> Highlights, Installation, Projects, Scripts, Tools, Python versions, and The pip interface are first-class sections in the docs landing page.

> The docs surface includes guides for running scripts, using tools, working on projects, publishing packages, and GitHub Actions integration.
